attributes.action: Introduce fair pricing rules for holidays to stop penalising families
attributes.additional_details: It is disgraceful that a flight before school holiday is £22 per person but the same flight during school holidays is £350 per person. Parents work hard and it is a national disgrace that families are violated this way
attributes.background: Put in place controls against tour / flight operators inflating prices during school holidays as it is unfair and scandalous

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban holiday companies from implementing price hikes during school breaks
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759942
